ModMetaData.name: RimTweaks by NoAd
ModMetaData.author: NoAd
ModMetaData.description:
Personal compilation mod — cherry-picked features from various mods to avoid installing large mods for a single mechanic.
Features: - Vanilla Autodoor gets door lock policy (requires VEF): Default / Everyone / Only colonists and animals / Only colonists, animals and friendlies / Only drafted
